name: AS510_PilotOff
description:
This intent is used when the customer wants to turn the pilot light off.
The system should also recognize common pronunciation variations such as “of” or “af”

sampleUtterances.utterance: Off

Guide me to shut off the gas.
Turn off the pilot light, please.
I need help stopping the heater.
I want to disable the pilot.
My pilot’s on—I want it off.
Shut off the heater, please.

Turn off the gas flame.
